title: Designing Machine Learning Systems
subtitle: An Iterative Process for Production-Ready Applications
author: Chip Huyen
themes: ML systems are complex sociotechnical systems
Data is the most important component of ML
Monitoring and maintenance are production essentials
Responsible AI is a systems concern
awards: Used by ML teams at top tech companies
excerpt: Machine learning systems are both complex and unique. Complex because they consist of many components and involve many stakeholders. Unique because they are data-dependent, with data varying wildly from one use case to the next.
